targets.query:
from(bucket: "iot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bin_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "fill_level")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "iot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bin_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "iot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bin_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "methane_ppm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "iot")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "actuator_status")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "iot")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gateway_events")
  |> group(columns: ["severity"])
  |> count()

from(bucket: "iot")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gateway_events")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 20)
